rationale: Your SoC (15%) is below our minimum sharing threshold (30%), and islanded operation with declining load requires strict conservation; prior sharing with low-SoC peers did not stabilize them, so outbound energy is held until recovery or grid reconnection.

user:

Strict hold on all outbound energy until SoC recovers above 0.30 or grid reconnects. Owner-circle requests (r2c3) monitored but deferred unless marked critical..
